messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Checking. Looks like SendGrid API returning 503 with message 'too many requests from single source'. Investigating.

messages.author: frank_nguyen
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Found the issue: SendGrid had a 20-minute partial outage. Without circuit breaking, all 2 000 wor.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
